name: Is COVID I got at work considered an occupational illness under Idaho law?
description: Yes if proven work-contracted by >50% likelihood; tough but possible[3].

mainEntity.name: Is COVID I got at work considered an occupational illness under Idaho law?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if proven work-contracted by >50% likelihood; tough but possible[3].
acceptedAnswer.description:
Possibly, if you prove by preponderance it was contracted at work, not elsewhere[3].

Idaho courts require showing disease 'actually incurred' in employment; community exposures can defeat claims[3].

- Need medical timeline, coworker infections.
- Preponderance standard, not beyond doubt.
- Commission decides factually.

Document everything; legal help navigates proof burdens effectively[3].
